---
applyTo: "src/**/*.{tsx,jsx,ts,css}"
---
# App Design Skill Required

When creating or modifying any UI component, layout, page, or style, you **must** read the [app-design](../skills/app-design/SKILL.md) skill. Do not skip this step — it contains the aesthetic direction, theming workflow, layout principles, and accessibility requirements that every UI change must follow.
